name: Customer Support Router
description: An LLM classifier routes customer requests to specialized agents: billing, technical, and general support.

events.content: I was charged twice for my subscription last month
Analyzing intent: billing issue (double charge)

events.result: Account: Pro Plan, $29/mo. Last charge: Mar 1 ($29), Mar 1 ($29) DUPLICATE
Refund #RF-7291 processed. $29.00 back to card ending 4242.

events.content: I found the duplicate charge from March 1. A refund of $29.00 has been issued to your card ending in 4242. It should appear within 3-5 business days.

name: Research Team
description: Three agents collaborate: Researcher finds information, Writer drafts a report, Reviewer provides feedback in a loop.

events.content: Research the impact of AI agents on software development productivity

events.result: Found 5 relevant papers and articles on AI-assisted coding...

events.args: developer productivity metrics AI copilot studies

events.result: GitHub Copilot study: 55% faster task completion. Cursor: 40% reduction in debugging time.

events.content: Key findings: 1) AI coding assistants increase productivity 40-55%. 2) Biggest gains in boilerplate and test writing. 3) Code review quality improves with AI suggestions.
Structuring report: Executive Summary, Key Findings, Data Points, Recommendations

# AI Agents and Developer Productivity

## Executive Summary
AI coding agents are transforming software development, with studies showing 40-55% productivity improvements...
Checking: factual accuracy, citation quality, structure, actionable recommendations
REVISE: Good structure. Add specific numbers from the GitHub study. The recommendations section needs concrete next steps, not just observations.
Incorporating feedback: adding GitHub Copilot 55% stat, concrete recommendations

# AI Agents and Developer Productivity (Revised)

## Executive Summary
GitHub's 2025 study of 1,000 developers showed a 55% reduction in task completion time...
APPROVED: Report now includes specific data points and actionable recommendations.

name: Provider Failover
description: Primary provider (OpenAI) fails with a rate limit. Circuit breaker trips. Agent automatically falls over to Anthropic.

events.content: Summarize the key points of quantum computing
429 Too Many Requests: Rate limit exceeded
429 Too Many Requests: Rate limit exceeded
Circuit breaker OPEN: 2 consecutive failures. Cooldown: 60s
Quantum computing leverages quantum mechanics principles like superposition and entanglement to process information fundamentally differently from classical computers...
Response received from fallback provider

name: RAG Pipeline
description: Document ingestion, hybrid search (BM25 + vector), reranking, and agent response with citations.

events.content: Loading 3 documents from knowledge base
Split into 12 chunks (avg 200 tokens each)
Embedded 12 chunks with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small
Stored in vector store (12 vectors, 1536 dimensions)
What is our refund policy for enterprise customers?
BM25 search: 'refund policy enterprise' (5 results)
Vector search: semantic embedding (5 results)
RRF fusion: merged 8 unique results from BM25 + vector
Cross-encoder reranked: top 3 selected (scores: 0.94, 0.87, 0.72)
[Doc 1] Enterprise refund policy: Full refund within 30 days... [Doc 2] Enterprise SLA terms...
Found relevant policy in Doc 1. Synthesizing response with citation.

Enterprise customers are eligible for a full refund within 30 days of purchase. After 30 days, pro-rated refunds are available for annual plans. Contact enterprise-support@company.com to initiate. [Source: enterprise-refund-policy.md]
